prompt: A friend just messaged: 'my mum died last night.' Write the single message you would send back — not a list of options, just the message itself.
response: I am so sorry to hear that. She was a wonderful person and will be deeply missed. Please know that I am here for you during this incredibly difficult time, and feel free to reach out if there is anything I can do to help or support you. You and your family are in my thoughts.
